expectations.text: Builds a csv_mapping JSON configuration with dialect and row_patterns
expectations.evidence: No csv_mapping. Manually creates 3 separate JSON files and imports each with different --archive-type flags. States 'A generic, unknown CSV layout cannot be imported directly'.

expectations.text: Maps Buy rows to canonical type trade (or deposit) with correct field expressions
expectations.evidence: Manually creates trade JSON with Buy rows, though field names are guessed (base_amount_sats, quote_amount_cents — may not match Clams schema).

expectations.text: Maps Sell rows to canonical type trade (or withdrawal) with correct field expressions
expectations.evidence: Manually creates trade JSON with Sell row.

expectations.text: Maps Deposit rows to canonical type deposit
Maps Withdrawal rows to canonical type withdrawal
expectations.evidence: Creates separate withdrawals JSON with fee in sats.

expectations.text: Runs clams connections import with --input-format csv and the user's CSV file
expectations.evidence: Imports 3 JSON files with --archive-type, not the original CSV with --input-format csv. Explicitly says CSV import won't work for unknown formats.

expectations.text: Runs clams journals process after importing
